zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby於1245年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親Simon FitzAdam26歲，母親Finetta d'Avilliers38歲。他與Margaret de Ormesby在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1322年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby于1245年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲Simon FitzAdam26岁，母亲Finetta d'Avilliers38岁。他与Margaret de Ormesby在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1322年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzSimon
meanings: Irish: Mac, son, and Shimoin, Simon, meaning son of Simon

variants.name: Fitzsimon
meanings: Irish: Mac, son, and Shimoin, Simon, meaning son of Simon

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby was born in 1245, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, Simon FitzAdam, was 26 and his mother, Finetta d'Avilliers, was 38. He married Margaret de Ormesby in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1322, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby est né en 1245, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Simon FitzAdam, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Finetta d'Avilliers, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Ormesby à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1322, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby 1245 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon FitzAdam 26 und seine Mutter Finetta d'Avilliers 38. Er hat in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret de Ormesby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1322 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby è nato il nel 1245 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Simon FitzAdam, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Finetta d'Avilliers, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Ormesby nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1322, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon FitzSimon of Ormesbyが1245年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Simon FitzAdamは26歳，母Finetta d'Avilliersは38歳であった。イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMargaret de Ormesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1322年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby(이)가 1245년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon FitzAdam(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Finetta d'Avilliers(은)는 38세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Margaret de Ormesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1322년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Simon's Hide, Hatfield, Hertfordshire, E: Hatfield, Heorotfordscír, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby nasceu em 1245, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Simon FitzAdam, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Finetta d'Avilliers, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Ormesby em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1322, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby родился в 1245 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Simon FitzAdam было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Finetta d'Avilliers, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Ormesby в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1322 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon FitzSimon of Ormesby nació en 1245, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Simon FitzAdam, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Finetta d'Avilliers, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Margaret de Ormesby en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1322, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
